## Summary

Explain what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Data source / ingestion
- [ ] Scoring / thresholds
- [ ] Backend/API
- [ ] Frontend/map
- [ ] Notifications / operations
- [ ] Security hardening

## Verification

Describe tests, commands or manual checks performed.

## Risk/scoring impact

If this changes scoring, thresholds, alerts or model interpretation, explain the expected impact and any validation performed.

## Public-data grounding

List the public datasets, standards or references used for verification.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused.
- [ ] I updated docs/examples where needed.
- [ ] I added tests or explained why tests are not applicable.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, private data or large generated files.
- [ ] I used cautious language for risk and public-safety claims.
